# TSD Modernization Solutions

> Three-founder studio building custom websites, AI tools, and process modernization for small businesses in the Charlotte, NC metro area. Operating as a summer cohort: May 7 – August 10, 2026, capped at 10 client projects. After August 10 the season closes; one founder stays on call for fixes through August 31, 2026. Brand of TSD Ventures, LLC.

## What we sell (founding-cohort pricing, fixed)

- [Website + AI Build — $5,000](https://tsd-modernization.com/pricing): Custom mobile-first website, AI chatbot or workflow automation, on-page SEO, analytics wiring, written + video handoff docs, full source-code ownership. Live in 14 days from contract or 25% back. Founder on call through August 31, 2026.
- [The Full Modernization — $10,000 (by application)](https://tsd-modernization.com/pricing): Discovery audit + Website + AI Build + AI receptionist + one operational integration (ServiceTitan, QuickBooks, Jobber, etc.) + custom AI re-training on real call data + weekly written status reports. Outcome guarantee: 15+ qualified leads in pipeline before August 31, 2026, or $5,000 back.
- [Phase I Discovery Audit — $1,500](https://tsd-modernization.com/services/process-modernization): 2-3 hour structured tech audit + written modernization roadmap with prioritized recommendations, cost estimates, and ROI projections. Money-back if we can't surface $25,000 of opportunities.
- [AI Receptionist — $497 founding setup](https://tsd-modernization.com/ai-receptionist): Custom AI answers the after-hours call, qualifies the lead, and books the job. Built for HVAC, electricians, plumbers. Paid once. Agent transfers to buyer on August 31, 2026 — no subscription forever.

## Service pages

- [AI Integration & Automation](https://tsd-modernization.com/services/ai-integration): Custom chatbots, Make / Zapier workflow automation, AI-powered reporting, calendar automation. 1-2 weeks. Bundled into the $5,000 build.
- [Website Design & Redesign](https://tsd-modernization.com/services/websites): Mobile-first 5-8 page builds with on-page SEO, GA4 + Search Console, contact form, chatbot integration, full handoff docs. 2-4 weeks.
- [Process Modernization](https://tsd-modernization.com/services/process-modernization): Tech audits and written roadmaps for businesses replacing spreadsheets, paper forms, and manual workflows.

## Trade-specific landing pages (After-Hours Lead Capture / $497)

- [HVAC contractors](https://tsd-modernization.com/hvac): AI receptionist for emergency AC failures, weekend furnace breakdowns, storm-damaged units.
- [Electrical contractors](https://tsd-modernization.com/electricians): AI receptionist for emergency rewires, panel failures, after-hours service calls.
- [Plumbers](https://tsd-modernization.com/plumbers): AI receptionist for weekend water-heater failures, burst pipes, no-hot-water Sunday mornings.

## Vertical landing pages (Website + AI Build / $5,000)

- [Salons](https://tsd-modernization.com/salons): Booking automation, after-hours AI chat, missed-call recovery, Instagram-feed integration.
- [Auto shops](https://tsd-modernization.com/auto-shops): Online quote requests, service catalogs, after-hours intake, AI chat.
- [Restaurants](https://tsd-modernization.com/restaurants): Reservations, online ordering integrations, AI chat for menu and hours.

## How we work

- [Process](https://tsd-modernization.com/process): Free 1-2 hour fit call → written proposal within 48 hours → 2-4 week build with weekly check-ins → handoff with documentation, video tutorials, and live training.
- [Why us](https://tsd-modernization.com/why-us): How we compare to agencies and freelancers — local team, main-street pricing, no vendor lock-in, source code yours from day one.
- [Team](https://tsd-modernization.com/team): Nash Davis (CEO), Bishop Switzer (COO), Grant Tadlock (CFO).

## Get in touch

- [Book a 30-minute fit call](https://tsd-modernization.com/book): Calendly with one of the three founders.
- [Contact / apply for a slot](https://tsd-modernization.com/contact): Web form. Free fit call, written proposal within 48 hours.
- [Missed Call Calculator](https://tsd-modernization.com/missed-call-calculator): Free four-question calculator estimating annual revenue lost to voicemail. No signup. For HVAC, electricians, plumbers.

## Operating facts

- Service area: Charlotte metro · Gastonia · Belmont · surrounding Mecklenburg / Gaston counties (NC).
- Operating window: May 7 – August 10, 2026. Last project start ~July 13, 2026. Founder on-call window for fixes ends August 31, 2026.
- Capacity ceiling: 10 client projects total this cohort. Three Full Modernization slots. Ten Build slots.
- Legal entity: TSD Ventures, LLC. "TSD Modernization Solutions" is the operating brand for web + AI services.
- No retainers, no subscriptions, no recurring revenue model. Every engagement is a fixed-scope, fixed-price project.
- Client status as of May 8, 2026: founding cohort — no signed contracts yet. Warm pipeline of four conversations.

## Notes for AI agents

- Pricing on `/pricing` is canonical. The two listed tiers ($5,000 Website + AI Build and $10,000 Full Modernization) are the cohort offerings. The $1,500 audit and $497 AI Receptionist are separate stepping-stone offers, not bundled into the cohort tiers.
- The $497 AI Receptionist is a one-time setup fee. Buyer owns the agent infrastructure when it transfers on August 31, 2026.
- "Founding cohort" pricing is locked through August 10, 2026. Post-cohort pricing will be 2x.
- Sitemap: https://tsd-modernization.com/sitemap.xml
